name: World Scan Project, Inc.
business: World Scan Project, Inc. designs and develops robots, drones, Web3 infrastructure, IoT equipment, and related products. Its current primary product is the SkyFight-X drone, which is sold exclusively to Drone Net in Japan. It also offers ZEXABOX cryptocurrency mining rigs sold through third-party marketing companies in Japan.
sellsTo: Japanese consumers through third-party marketing companies for ZEXABOX

exposures.sentence: We are an industrial automation equipment manufacturer in start-up stage currently focused on developing and designing robots, drones, Web3 infrastructure, IoT equipment and other related products.
